free_text: and 142Ce(n,2n)141Ce reactions with the neutron energy
The weights of natCe, 197Au and natIn metal foils are
83.3 mg, 343.3 mg and 275.6 mg, having purity of 99.9%
These foils were wrapped separately with 0.025 mm
coupled to a PC-based 4096 channel analyzer.
The resolution of the HPGe detector has a FWHM of
1.8 keV at 1332.5 keV gamma-ray photo-peak of 60Co.
The natCe-Au-In foils stack was irradiated
for 1.5 hour and cooled for 0.5-1.2 hour.
